title: Senior Software Engineer
description: We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our team. Requirements: 5+ years of experience with Python, JavaScript, or Java. Strong knowledge of REST APIs, microservices architecture, and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP). Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines. Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work in agile teams. BS in Computer Science or equivalent.

title: Data Scientist
description: Data Scientist position. Requirements: MS/PhD in Statistics, Computer Science, or related field. 3+ years experience with Python, R, SQL. Proficiency in machine learning (scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch). Experience with data visualization (Tableau, Power BI). Strong communication skills. Knowledge of NLP and deep learning is a plus.

title: Product Manager
description: Product Manager needed. 4+ years in product management. Experience with agile methodologies, user research, and product analytics. Strong stakeholder management and cross-functional collaboration. Technical background preferred. Experience with Jira, Figma, and SQL. MBA or equivalent experience.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: DevOps Engineer. Requirements: 3+ years in DevOps/SRE. Expertise in AWS, Terraform, Ansible. Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, Jenkins, GitHub Actions. Strong scripting (Bash, Python). Monitoring tools: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack. Linux system administration.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Frontend Developer. 3+ years with React, TypeScript, HTML/CSS. Experience with Tailwind, Redux, and modern build tools (Vite, Webpack). Responsive design and accessibility (WCAG). GraphQL or REST API integration. Portfolio required.
